title: FindPos Function
description:
FindPos Function

FindPos Function

See_Also Example

Returns a robot point stored by Find during a motion command.
see_also:
Find

Go

Jump

PosFound

FindPos Function Example

Find Sw(5) = On

		Go P10 Find

		If PosFound Then

		  Go FindPos

Else

		  Print "Cannot find the sensor signal."

		EndIf
examples:
Find Sw(5) = On
		Go P10 Find
		If PosFound Then
		  Go FindPos

		Else
		  Print "Cannot find the sensor signal."
		EndIf
